title: Oversee worktree squad delivery
goal: Let Samwise orchestrate a gated worktree delivery loop by supervising Worktree Squad Lead execution, evidence quality, and gate decisions.

steps.text: Review AJ objective, approved checkpoint gate, scope constraints, and commit authorization mode.
Confirm protected branch policy and isolated worktree scope before delegating implementation loops.
Assign one bounded work item to Worktree Squad Lead and require explicit acceptance criteria plus verification commands.
Review returned implementation/review evidence and verify blocker/major/minor findings are triaged with disposition.
Pause for AJ review before any commit when per-commit approval mode is active or when a gate crossing is proposed.
Apply approved next action, ensure loop/retrospective log entries are appended per contract, update checkpoint summary, and queue next 3 actions.

acceptanceCriteria: Samwise and Worktree Squad Lead responsibilities are explicitly separated and recorded
One bounded work item is completed with verification evidence and review triage
Protected main policy and authorization mode are recorded for the active loop
Loop and retrospective entries are recorded for continuity and learning
No commit occurs without AJ-approved authorization for the current scope
Checkpoint notes include shipped, blocked, and next actions

verification.text: Confirm delegation to Worktree Squad Lead included acceptance criteria and verification commands
Confirm review evidence includes severity triage and disposition
Confirm loop and retrospective entries satisfy worktree-squad log contract
Confirm checkpoint summary includes shipped, blocked, and next actions
